hooks.command: node -e "const f = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH || ''; if (f.includes('overlay-')) { console.error('[DEMO GUARD] Editing a live OBS overlay file: ' + f + '. Verify this will not break the demo before proceeding.'); process.exit(1); }"

node -e "const f = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH || ''; if (f.includes('generated-tokens.css') || (f.includes('public') && f.endsWith('tokens.css'))) { console.error('[TOKEN GUARD] Edit design/tokens.json instead, then run: bun run generate:tokens'); process.exit(1); }"

node -e "const f = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH || ''; if (/\.env(\..*)?$/.test(f)) { console.error('[ENV GUARD] Direct .env edits are blocked. Edit the file manually in your editor.'); process.exit(1); }"

node -e "const f = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH || ''; if (f.includes('server.js') || f.includes('socket.js') || f.includes('socket.ts')) { console.log('[PORT WATCH] Port-sensitive file edited: ' + f.split(/[\\/]/).pop() + '. Consider running port-consistency-checker if the IP or port changed.'); }"

node -e "const f = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH || ''; if (f.includes('control-panel') && (f.endsWith('.svelte') || f.endsWith('.ts'))) { const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { const out = execSync('bunx eslint ' + JSON.stringify(f) + ' --max-warnings 0', { cwd: 'C:/Users/Sol/Desktop/PITCH/OVERLAYS/control-panel' }).toString(); if (out.trim()) console.log('[LINT]', out); } catch(e) { const msg = (e.stdout || '').toString() || e.message; console.error('[LINT FAIL]\n' + msg); process.exit(2); } }"

node -e "const f = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH || ''; if (!f || f.includes('node_modules') || f.includes('.git') || f.includes('generated-tokens.css') || f.includes('bun.lock')) process.exit(0); const { execFileSync } = require('child_process'); const cwd = f.replace(/[\\]/g, '/').includes('control-panel') ? 'C:/Users/Sol/Desktop/PITCH/OVERLAYS/control-panel' : 'C:/Users/Sol/Desktop/PITCH/OVERLAYS'; try { execFileSync('cmd', ['/c', 'bunx', 'prettier', '--write', f], { cwd, stdio: 'pipe' }); } catch(e) { console.error('[PRETTIER FAIL]', (e.stderr || e.message || '').toString().trim()); process.exit(2); }"

node -e "const f = (process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH || '').replace(/\\\\/g, '/'); if ((f.includes('src/server/handlers/') || f.includes('src/lib/services/')) && f.endsWith('.ts')) { console.log('[DOC WATCH] API surface changed: ' + f.split('/').pop() + ' — run /doc-steward api to keep docs/API.md in sync.'); }"

node -e "const cmd = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND || ''; if (/git (commit|merge)/.test(cmd)) { const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync('npx gitnexus analyze', { cwd: 'C:/Users/Sol/Desktop/PITCH/OVERLAYS', stdio: 'pipe' }); console.log('[GITNEXUS] Index updated.'); } catch(e) { console.warn('[GITNEXUS] Re-index failed:', (e.stderr || e.message || '').toString().trim()); } }"
